creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
There are some problems with FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE AMD64 dvd1.iso installer
when using SYSINSTALL (shell -> sysinstall). A directory "/dist" seems to
be missing on the cd9660 filesystem and so packages cannot be mounted/
extracted into that location, making installation impossible. The errors
after COMMIT are following:

 "Couldn't create directory /dist: Read-only filesystem" , "Error mounting
/dev/cd1 on /dist: No such file or directory (2)".

How-To-Repeat: 1. After instalator starts select Shell.
2. From shell start sysinstall.
3. Customize installation, click COMMIT, see error  "Couldn't create
   directory /dist: Read-only filesyetem" , "Error mounting /dev/cd1
   on /dist: No such file or directory (2)".
